description: Free Trade Zones & General Services Employees Union and Another Vs. Commissioner General of Labour and Others Free Trade Zones & General Services Employees Union and Another Vs. Commissioner General of Labour and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Free Trade Zones & General Services Employees Union and Another Vs. Commissioner General of Labour and Others Free Trade Zones & General Services Employees Union and Another Vs. Commissioner General of Labour and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioners challenge the publication of the collective agreement entered into between the employer and the representatives of its employees, under the supervision of the 1st to 3 rd Respondents, on the basis that they have interest in the matter and the said agreement is not beneficial to the employees since it is against the Regulations made under the Wages Board Ordinance. Held – Application dismissed with cost since the agreement is consistent with the law.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
